body: closes #150 - This commit adds Atmos.global_rmse_pfull which computes the global RMSE in pressure space for 3D variables over longitude, latitude, and altitude or pressure. Automatic conversion to pressure coordinates is done using the keyword arguments `sim_pressure` and `obs_pressure`. Specific pressure levels can be considered using `target_pressure`.
title: Add Atmos.global_rmse_pfull
